questions: Q1: How should the HTTP client be generalized to support non-inspect API paths?
Q2: What is the best command structure for comment commands following existing CLI patterns?
Q3: How should the CLI resolve the ticket ID for comment operations?

answers.answer: Add an optional basePath parameter to hxFetch (defaulting to '/api/inspect' for backward compatibility). The URL construction changes from hardcoded '/api/inspect' to the provided basePath. All existing inspect callers continue working unchanged. Comment commands pass basePath='/api' and construct paths like /tickets/:ticketId/comments. The auth header logic (hxi_ detection) is already generic and works for both endpoint types.
evidence: http.ts line 43: const url = new URL(`${config.url}/api/inspect${path}`) — hardcoded prefix
http.ts lines 52-56: auth header logic works generically for any endpoint

answers.answer: Add a 'comments' top-level command with 'list' and 'post' subcommands: 'hlx comments list [--ticket <id>] [--helix-only] [--since <iso-date>]' and 'hlx comments post [--ticket <id>] <message>'. Create src/comments/index.ts for dispatch, src/comments/list.ts and src/comments/post.ts for implementations. The pattern mirrors inspect/index.ts with getFlag/getPositionalArgs helpers (these can be extracted to a shared lib/args.ts or duplicated given the CLI's zero-dependency philosophy).
evidence: index.ts lines 24-44: CLI switch router; new 'comments' case follows the same pattern
inspect/index.ts: subcommand dispatch with getFlag/getPositionalArgs — proven pattern

answers.answer: Support two resolution methods: (1) --ticket <id> flag for explicit specification, (2) HELIX_TICKET_ID environment variable as fallback when the flag is omitted. The env var is auto-detected via the existing config loading pattern in config.ts. For sandbox agents, the server injects HELIX_TICKET_ID into env.sh alongside existing vars. For external CLI users, the --ticket flag is always required. If neither is available, print a clear error message.
evidence: config.ts lines 14-19: env var loading pattern (HELIX_API_KEY, HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN, HELIX_URL)
orchestrator.ts lines 1158-1164: env.sh currently exports HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN and HELIX_INSPECT_BASE_URL

statement: The CLI needs three changes: (1) Generalize hxFetch with an optional basePath parameter (default '/api/inspect') so comment commands can target /api/tickets/:id/comments. (2) Add hlx comments list and hlx comments post subcommands following the existing inspect command pattern. (3) Support HELIX_TICKET_ID env var for automatic ticket resolution in sandboxes, with --ticket flag as override. Zero new runtime dependencies; existing zero-dep philosophy preserved.
